nameSeparatorDesc: Separator inserted between multiple reference names. Sync matches all heading levels and ignores leading numbers such as 1.2 or 1.3.
deduplicateByTargetBlockDesc: Count the same referenced block only once under the matched heading.
noTextFields: The current database has no text fields to match headings
syncSummary: Heading refs synced: scanned ${scanned} items, wrote ${fields} fields
